title: Rate Limiting (SA Finding #2) Token Bucket Algorithm
summary: Implement token bucket rate limiting in network/proxy-thai.js to prevent abuse. Global limit: 1,000 req/min, per-IP limit: 100 req/min. Spike test: 2,000 req/min load (verify 429 rejection). Stale-IP cleanup prevents memory leaks.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Token bucket algorithm in proxyHandler before router.callModel(). Global: 1,000 tokens/min, Per-IP: 100 tokens/min. Each request costs 1 token.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Code review; verify refill rate matches limits.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Per-IP identification via X-Forwarded-For header (with fallback to req.socket.remoteAddress). Use leftmost IP from header.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Test both header and socket scenarios; correct IP extracted.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: HTTP 429 response with JSON body {error, message, retryAfter} and Retry-After header. Match existing proxy error format.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Send requests until limit hit; verify 429, header, and JSON present.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Auto-cleanup: remove IP buckets not accessed within 5 minutes (CONFIG.rateLimiting.staleIpTtlMs). Prevents memory leaks.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Create 100 IPs, send 1 request each, wait 5+ min. Old buckets removed from Map.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Configuration via environment variables: PROXY_RATE_LIMIT_GLOBAL, PROXY_RATE_LIMIT_PER_IP, PROXY_RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS, PROXY_RATE_LIMIT_STALE_TTL_MS.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Set env vars, restart proxy, verify rate limits change.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Spike test: 2,000 req/min for 60 seconds. Expect ~1,000 accepted, ~1,000 rejected (429). Document response distribution.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Test passes; 429s proportional to limits; no crashes.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Backward compatibility: request/response format unchanged. All 12 existing proxy tests pass.
acceptance_criteria.verification: npm test: 12/12 existing tests + 4 new rate limit tests.

implementation_tasks.title: TokenBucket class design
implementation_tasks.description: Class: {tokens, lastRefillTime, capacity, refillRate}. Methods: canConsume(n=1), refill(). Global bucket: var. Per-IP buckets: Map<string, TokenBucket>.

implementation_tasks.title: Integrate into proxyHandler
implementation_tasks.description: Line 143: Extract IP, check global+per-IP buckets, return 429 if denied, consume tokens if allowed.

implementation_tasks.title: Stale IP cleanup
implementation_tasks.description: setInterval every 30 sec: remove buckets with lastRefillTime > 5 min ago. Async, non-blocking.

implementation_tasks.title: CONFIG.rateLimiting setup
implementation_tasks.description: Load env vars: PROXY_RATE_LIMIT_GLOBAL, PROXY_RATE_LIMIT_PER_IP, PROXY_RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS, PROXY_RATE_LIMIT_STALE_TTL_MS.

implementation_tasks.title: 429 response formatting
implementation_tasks.description: Calculate secondsUntilReset, return HTTP 429 with Retry-After header and JSON body.

implementation_tasks.title: extractClientIp helper
implementation_tasks.description: Parse X-Forwarded-For header or fallback to req.socket.remoteAddress. Handle IPv4/IPv6.

implementation_tasks.title: Logging for rate limits
implementation_tasks.description: Log rejections and cleanup events using existing log() function.

risks.title: Cleanup race condition
risks.mitigation: Copy IP keys before cleanup iteration

risks.title: Global limit too aggressive
risks.mitigation: Document limits; allow adjustment via env var

success_definition: Rate limiting implemented and tested. 429 responses with Retry-After header. Spike test documents behavior. Stale IP cleanup prevents leaks. All 12 existing tests pass.
